paper_title: Karst System Study of Gruta da Companheira

methods.description: Documenting lithology, color, and geometry of geomorphological features to understand the karst system of Companheira.

steps.description: Document lithology, colour and geometry of geomorphological features visible across the hilltop above the cave and in the two artificial sections.
steps.searchable_summary: record geomorphological features of the site

methods.method_name: 3D Model Creation of Gruta da Companheira
methods.description: Creating a complete 3D model of the cave using speleological survey data.

steps.description: Conduct a speleological survey using a DistoX2 device.
Download data from DistoX2 to a tablet via Bluetooth and display, edit, and save with TopoDroid.
Edit point data in Fusion 360 and Blender 2.93 to produce a 3D model of the cave.

methods.description: Acquiring and analyzing ERT and GPR data to map inaccessible cavities of the cave.

steps.description: Acquire ERT data using a Lippmann 4-point light 10 W resistivity metre connected to a chain of 20 electrodes.
steps.searchable_summary: collect ERT data with resistivity metre

steps.description: Acquire GPR data using a GSSI TerraSIRch SIR System-3000 with a 200 MHz antenna.
steps.searchable_summary: collect GPR data with TerraSIRch system

steps.description: Process and analyze GPR data using Reflex 7.5 software.

methods.description: Collecting topographic points across the research area using RTK DGPS.

steps.description: Use Emlid Reach RS2 RTK DGPS to collect topographic points.
steps.searchable_summary: collect topographic data with RTK DGPS
